description: Signal categories for discovery-phase keyword matching. Patched by /fabric-heal skill. All scripts MUST load from this file.

inference_rules.pattern: (need a |)(number|metric|report|answer|dashboard|slide) .{0,15}(for|in front of|to present|to show|to give) .{0,15}(board|CEO|CFO|CTO|executive|management|leadership|investor|stakeholder)
inference_rules.label: Executive reporting need

inference_rules.pattern: (asking|ask) .{0,15}(question|thing).{0,15}(can't|cannot|unable|don't know how to|no way to) answer
inference_rules.label: Unanswerable questions

inference_rules.pattern: (timing out|timed? out|time.?out|doesn.?t finish|never completes|takes too long|keeps? failing)
inference_rules.label: Job timeout/completion failure

inference_rules.pattern: (Rube Goldberg|house of cards|duct tape|band.?aid|bubble gum|held together with|might collapse|afraid to touch|nobody wants to touch)
inference_rules.label: Fragile architecture metaphor

inference_rules.pattern: (can't|cannot|not allowed to|must not|prohibited from) .{0,30}(move|transfer|export|send|transmit|copy).{0,30}(data|information).{0,20}(out of|outside|from|across|to another)
inference_rules.label: Data residency/sovereignty constraint

inference_rules.pattern: bring .{0,20}(together|into one|in one place|under one|into a single)
inference_rules.label: Data consolidation intent

inference_rules.pattern: (single source of truth|golden record|master data|one version of|trust the numbers|conflicting data|different numbers)
inference_rules.label: Trust/consistency concern

inference_rules.pattern: (nobody|no one|people don.?t|staff don.?t|team doesn.?t|organization doesn.?t).{0,30}(trusts?|believes?|rely on|have confidence in).{0,15}data
inference_rules.label: Data trust deficit

inference_rules.pattern: (decision|we decide|make.{0,5}decision).{0,20}(data doesn.?t|data does not|data can.?t|no data|without data|lacking data)
inference_rules.label: Decision-data gap

inference_rules.pattern: (semantic layer|metrics layer|metric store|universal metric|unified metric|business glossary)
inference_rules.label: Semantic/metrics layer need

inference_rules.pattern: (look it up|find it|answer it|check it|get it) (themselves|by themselves|on their own|without|independently)
inference_rules.label: Self-service lookup intent
